mapper.select: SELECT p.*, c.name AS category_name, sk.id AS sku_id, sk.product_id AS sku_product_id, sk.sku_code AS sku_sku_code, sk.spec AS sku_spec, sk.price AS sku_price, sk.stock AS sku_stock, sk.status AS sku_status FROM product p LEFT JOIN category c ON p.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN product_sku sk ON sk.product_id = p.id AND sk.status = 1 WHERE p.id = #{id}
